mapper.select:
SELECT p.project_id, p.project_name, p.revenue_confirm_year, p.confirm_amount, p.revenue_confirm_status, p.project_dept, p.project_stage, c.contract_status, c.contract_amount, psc.change_id, psc.old_stage, psc.new_stage, psc.change_reason, COALESCE(u.nick_name, psc.create_by) AS change_by, psc.create_time AS change_time FROM pm_project p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, MIN(contract_id) AS contract_id FROM pm_project_contract_rel WHERE del_flag = '0' AND rel_status = '有效' GROUP BY project_id ) pcr ON p.project_id = pcr.project_id LEFT JOIN pm_contract c ON pcr.contract_id = c.contract_id AND c.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON CAST(p.project_dept AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(d.dept_id AS CHAR) LEFT JOIN sys_user u_create ON p.create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = u_create.user_name LEFT JOIN ( SELECT change_id, project_id, old_stage, new_stage, change_reason, create_by, create_time FROM ( SELECT change_id, project_id, old_stage, new_stage, change_reason, create_by, create_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY project_id ORDER BY create_time DESC, change_id DESC) AS rn FROM pm_project_stage_change WHERE del_flag = '0' ) t WHERE rn = 1 ) psc ON p.project_id = psc.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON psc.create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = u.user_name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
p.del_flag = '0' AND p.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%')
AND (p.project_dept = #{projectDept} OR p.project_dept IN (SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{projectDept}, ancestors) > 0))
AND p.project_stage = #{projectStage} ${params.dataScope}
ORDER BY p.update_time DESC

SELECT psc.change_id, psc.project_id, psc.old_stage, psc.new_stage, psc.change_reason, COALESCE(u.nick_name, psc.create_by) AS create_by, psc.create_time FROM pm_project_stage_change psc LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON psc.create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = u.user_name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE psc.project_id = #{projectId} AND psc.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY psc.create_time DESC, psc.change_id DESC
SELECT change_id, project_id, old_stage, new_stage, change_reason, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM pm_project_stage_change WHERE change_id = #{changeId}
SELECT project_stage FROM pm_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_project SET project_stage = #{projectStage}, update_time = NOW() WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pm_project_stage_change
project_id, old_stage, new_stage, change_reason, del_flag, create_by, create_time,
#{projectId}, #{oldStage}, #{newStage}, #{changeReason}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM pm_project_stage_change WHERE change_id IN
#{changeId}
